  val businessOrder = Map("electronics" -> 0, "grocery" -> 1, "pharmacy" -> 2, "restaurant" -> 3)

    val aOrder = businessOrder(aBl)
    val bOrder = businessOrder(bBl)
    if (aOrder != bOrder) aOrder < bOrder else aCode < bCode

  sorted.map(_._2).toArray
}

def solve(code: Array[String], businessLine: Array[String], isActive: Array[Boolean]): Array[String] = {
  val allowedBusiness = Set("electronics", "grocery", "pharmacy", "restaurant")
  val businessOrder = Map("electronics" -> 0, "grocery" -> 1, "pharmacy" -> 2, "restaurant" -> 3)
  val valid = for (i <- 0 until code.length if code(i).nonEmpty && code(i).matches("^[a-zA-Z0-9_]+$") && allowedBusiness.contains(businessLine(i)) && isActive(i)) yield (businessLine(i), code(i))
  
  val sorted = valid.sortWith { case (a, b) =>
    val aOrder = businessOrder(a._1)
    val bOrder = businessOrder(b._1)
    if (aOrder != bOrder) aOrder < bOrder else a._2 < b._2
  }
  
  sorted.map { case (bl, c) => c }.toArray
}
```
